title: Pure Discs - Relic
description: Pure Discs - Relic adds the awesome new music disc Relic, which released with 1.20! This new disc drops from Husks with a 5% chance.
body:
This mod is End of Life. Please consider downloading the successor to this mod: Pure Discs - Trails & Tales (Fabric/Forge)

Pure Discs - Relic will not be updated beyond its current state. The above mod includes the Relic disc, and four other beautiful tracks which were released in 1.20.

     

     

📘 About this mod:

 

Pure Discs - Relic adds the awesome new music disc Relic, which released with 1.20! This new disc drops from Husks with a 5% chance. 
 

This mod is intended to be used alongside my other mods, which I'm calling "micro-mods". I aim to combat bloated, overproduced mods with my simplistic, segmented micro-mods. Curate your own features without editing confusing config files and disabling recipes. Check my profile to find more mods, and complete your pack!

📖 What's inside:


v1.0.0 - Initial release!

Added a new disc, Relic. Listen to the song here: https://youtu.be/iaqKlL0jWk8

This new disc drops from Husks with a 5% chance.

🙋‍♂️ FAQ:


Q: Will you backport to any older versions? 
A: Maybe. I've already backported to 1.18, but let me know if you have a request. 
 

Q: Does this work on version ____?
A: Try it and see! If it does, please comment so I can mark it. 
 

Q: This song slapped so hard, a creeper snuck up on me and killed me. Will you replace my stuff?
A: No, you accept all responsibility of how hard this tune goes. If you get killed while vibing to it, that's your fault. 
 

Q: Can you make this disc craftable?
A: I could offer a datapack which adds a crafting recipe to this disc, however I won't provide one by default. The default method to obtain this disc is Husks, at a 5% drop rate. If you want a recipe added, please join the Discord and share your thoughts. 

 

Leave a comment!

Thanks for downloading!

😅💗

 

‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎
